title: wedelia mexicana
intro: Wedelia mexicana, also known as Mexican plantain, is a perennial herb native to Central and South America, belonging to the asteraceae family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Wedelia mexicana include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used topically as a poultice or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
